x-enumeration-literals.name: Automatic Fund Transfer
x-enumeration-literals.description: Moves surplus cash from a primary account to another account or investment vehicle (e.g., savings, money market, or investment account).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Target Balance
x-enumeration-literals.description: Sweeps are triggered when the primary account exceeds a predefined balance threshold or falls below a minimum required balance.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Interest Optimization
x-enumeration-literals.description: Ensures excess funds are invested or earn interest instead of remaining idle in a low-interest account.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Overdraft Coverage
x-enumeration-literals.description: Can also sweep funds into the primary account to cover shortfalls or overdrafts automatically.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Frequency & Timing
x-enumeration-literals.description: Sweeps can occur daily, weekly, or in real-time, depending on bank rules and customer preference.
